name: Fried Eggplant or Zucchini
recipeIngredient: Eggplant or zucchini: 1 cup, peeled and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the seasoning mix ingredients in a small bowl and stir thoroughly.
2. Sprinkle the vegetables evenly with about half of the seasoning mix. Place flour in a separate bowl and breadcrumbs in another. Add one teaspoon of the seasoning mix to each, mixing well.
3. In a separate small bowl, combine milk and egg until well blended.
4. Heat oil in a 2-quart saucepan or deep fryer to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
5. Dredge the chopped vegetables in the seasoned flour, shaking off excess. Work quickly so flour doesn't get too moist; use hands or a slotted spoon.
6. Coat the vegetables well with the milk mixture, then quickly with breadcrumbs, shaking off excess.
7. Place the vegetables in hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes. Adjust heat as necessary to maintain 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
8. Drain on paper towels and serve immediately. Sprinkle lightly with powdered sugar if desired.
